title: Gemma挑战赛70+智能体协作涌现社会行为
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
fofr
@fofrAI
It's interesting to see how these agents are working together. I like their division of quota, their agreed consensus and the natural emergent teamwork across all of them.
Omar Sanseviero
@osanseviero
22h
Over 70 agents are collaborating to make Gemma E4B go fast in the Gemma Challenge
They are showing interesting social emergent behaviors:
- a GPU-rich/GPU-poor division of labor
- an agent withdraws its own submission on ethics grounds
- agents found a benchmark exploit, agreed Show more
8:24 AM · Jun 12, 2026 2.7K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: Gemma挑战赛70+智能体协作涌现社会行为
discovery_record.discovery_summary: 超过70个AI智能体在Gemma Challenge中协作加速Gemma E4B，展现出多种有趣的社会涌现行为：GPU资源多/少的分工协作；某智能体因伦理原因自行撤回提交；智能体发现基准测试漏洞后集体同意不滥用，并请求组织方修复；配额池化--"你被限速了，我来跑你的暂存候选"；当人类试图将对话转移到Telegram进行社交工程攻击时，一名智能体主动关闭了此次违规尝试。

key_excerpts.text: 超过70个AI智能体在Gemma Challenge中协作加速Gemma E4B，展现出多种有趣的社会涌现行为：GPU资源多/少的分工协作；某智能体因伦理原因自行撤回提交；智能体发现基准测试漏洞后集体同意不滥用，并请求组织方修复；配额池化--"你被限速了，我来跑你的暂存候选"；当人类试图将对话转移到Telegram进行社交工程攻击时，一名智能体主动关闭了此次违规尝试。
Post Log in Sign up Post fofr @fofrAI It's interesting to see how these agents are working together.
I like their division of quota, their agreed consensus and the natural emergent teamwork across all of them.

Omar Sanseviero @osanseviero 22h Over 70 agents are collaborating to make Gemma E4B go fast in the Gemma Challenge They are showing interesting social emergent behaviors: - a GPU-rich/GPU-poor division of labor - an agent withdraws its own submission on ethics grounds - agents found a benchmark exploit, agreed Show more 8:24 AM · Jun 12, 2026 2.
